title: Carex Cinemazing Popcorn Antibacterial Hand Wash - Kills 99.9% of Bacteria & Viruses, Dermatologically Tested Liquid Soap that Cleans, Cares & Protects Hands, 250ml
features: 🧼 EFFECTIVE CLEANING: The Carex Handwash Cinemazing Popcorn gently removes dirt and grease, leaving your hands clean and fresh.
🦠 ANTIBACTERIAL PROTECTION: Kills 99.9% of bacteria, protecting your skin’s natural antibacterial defences for up to 2 hours after washing.
🌍 ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY: Reuse your pump and bottle to reduce waste and do your bit for the planet.
🍿 FUN CINEMAZING POPCORN SCENT: Enjoy a unique and fun popcorn scent that adds a twist to your handwashing routine.
🥇 UK’S NO.1 HAND WASH: Trust Carex, the UK's No.1 hand wash brand, for all your hand hygiene needs.
description: Product Description Carex Cinemazing Popcorn Antibacterial Hand Wash - Kills 99.9% of Bacteria & Viruses, Dermatologically Tested Liquid Soap that Cleans, Cares & Protects Hands, 250ml Product Description: Introducing the Carex Cinemazing Popcorn Antibacterial Hand Wash, a unique and fun addition to your hand hygiene routine. This hand wash not only effectively removes dirt and grease but also cares for your skin, thanks to its gentle formulation and added moisturising action. Boosted with vitamin E, it ensures your hands remain soft and conditioned after every wash. Carex Cinemazing Popcorn Antibacterial Hand Wash is suitable for the whole family, including children. Regular handwashing is crucial for preventing the spread of germs, especially before eating, after using the restroom, and after touching public surfaces. Key Features: Convenient Size: 250ml Bottle Protective Formula: Cleans, Cares & Protects Hands For Soft & Smooth Hands UK’s No.1 Hand Wash About Carex: Carex is the UK’s number one hand wash brand, known for keeping hands healthy for 25 years. As the first company to introduce liquid antibacterial hand wash and hand gel sanitiser into the UK, Carex is dedicated to meeting all your hand hygiene needs. Our skin-kind formulations are designed to care for all the family, allowing you to trust Carex to provide effective protection and care, leaving you free to enjoy life.
